name: Lipella Pharmaceuticals Inc. Common Stock
summary: Lipella Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for the treatment of chronic urological conditions, including recurrent urinary tract infections (rUTIs) and other inflammatory diseases of the bladder. Their lead product candidate is LP-10, a liposome-encapsulated formulation of sodium bicarbonate for bladder irrigation. Lipella Pharmaceuticals is based in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania.
